Human.title: Human
Human.description: Humans are a type of humanoid. Due to having a large complex brain, they are fairly intelligent and have mastered the use of tools. Commonly known to have predominantly come from Earth, they mostly speak the Earthen mother tongue. Earthers have spent generations on Earth.

HumanSpacer.title: Human
HumanSpacer.description: Humans are a type of humanoid. Due to having a large complex brain, they are fairly intelligent and have mastered the use of tools. Commonly known to have predominantly come from Earth, they mostly speak the Earthen mother tongue. Spacers however have spent generations in space.
